---
 output: github_document
---

 <!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
 knitr::opts_chunk$set(
   collapse = TRUE,
   comment = "#>",
   fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
   out.width = "100%"
 )
```

# SAASI

 <!-- badges: start -->
 <!-- badges: end -->

SAASI is an ancestral state reconstruction method that accounts for variation in sampling rates among locations or traits.

For more details and how to use it check out [the tutorial](https://magpie-sfu.github.io/saasi/articles/saasi-tutorial.html).

## Installation

 You can install the current version of SAASI from
 [GitHub](https://github.com/MAGPIE-SFU/saasi) with:

 ``` r
 # install.packages("remotes")

 remotes::install_github("MAGPIE-SFU/saasi")

 ```
